creator: jordan@ostreff.info
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #1)
currently with facebook-rocksdb-v9.7.3_GH0.tar.gz I still have this errors:

------
llvm-ar: warning: creating librocksdb.a
env/env_basic_test.cc:104:1: error: 'InstantiateTestCase_P_IsDeprecated' is deprecated: INSTANTIATE_TEST_CASE_P is deprecated, please use INSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P [-Werror,-Wdeprecated-declarations]

      | ^

ln -fs librocksdb.so.9.7.3 librocksdb.so.9.7
ln -fs librocksdb.so.9.7.3 librocksdb.so.9
ln -fs librocksdb.so.9.7.3 librocksdb.so
clang++ -L. cache/cache_bench.o cache/cache_bench_tool.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o cache_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. db/range_del_aggregator_bench.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o range_del_aggregator_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. memtable/memtablerep_bench.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o memtablerep_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
rm -f librocksdb_test.so librocksdb_test.a
clang++ -L. tools/db_bench.o tools/db_bench_tool.o tools/simulated_hybrid_file_system.o test_util/testutil.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o db_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. util/filter_bench.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o filter_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. utilities/persistent_cache/persistent_cache_bench.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o persistent_cache_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. tools/db_repl_stress.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o db_repl_stress  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -Wl,--no-as-needed -shared -Wl,-soname -Wl,librocksdb_test.so -L. db/db_test_util.o db/db_with_timestamp_test_util.o test_util/mock_time_env.o test_util/secondary_cache_test_util.o test_util/testharness.o test_util/testutil.o utilities/agg_merge/test_agg_merge.o utilities/cassandra/test_utils.o table/mock_table.o third-party/gtest-1.8.1/fused-src/gtest/gtest-all.o  -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN'  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo  -o librocksdb_test.so
clang++ -L. tools/db_sanity_test.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o db_sanity_test  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. tools/write_stress.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o write_stress  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. tools/dump/rocksdb_dump.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o rocksdb_dump  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. tools/dump/rocksdb_undump.o -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o rocksdb_undump  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo
clang++ -L. table/table_reader_bench.o -lrocksdb_test -lrocksdb  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,'$ORIGIN' -o table_reader_bench  -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   -lpthread -lsnappy -lgflags -lz -lbz2 -llz4 -lzstd -lexecinfo   -pg
ld: error: undefined reference due to --no-allow-shlib-undefined: testing::internal::PrintBytesInObjectTo(unsigned char const*, unsigned long, std::__1::basic_ostream<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>>*)
>>> referenced by ./librocksdb_test.so
clang++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake: *** [Makefile:1609: table_reader_bench] Error 1
gmake: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
8 errors generated.
gmake: *** [Makefile:2569: env/env_basic_test.o] Error 1
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/rocksdb
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/rocksdb

===>>> make build failed for databases/rocksdb
===>>> Aborting update


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> databases/rocksdb

------

Probably the problem is with combination of ports versions? Actually I have similar result when building with llvm19 too.
